heading: Module Overview: Cell Biology
description: Cells are the fundamental structural and functional units of all living organisms. Discovered by Robert Hooke in 1665, the study of cells (cytology) encompasses organelle mechanisms, membrane transport, and cell division.
learningOutcomes: Understand the structure and functions of major cell organelles
Differentiate between Prokaryotic and Eukaryotic cells
Master high-yield SSC CGL facts regarding discovery, cell theory, and organelle nicknames
